evals.prompt: Review all the agent-facing guidance in this project. I want to see exactly what text agents receive when they use taskmd as a tool.
evals.expected_output: Labeled snippets from: agent.py schema guidance section, agent.py schema workflows, agent.py schema task_format, cli.py help text, README.md usage sections. Should NOT include AGENTS.md contributor guidance. Should flag any inconsistencies between sources.

evals.prompt: What do agents see when they use this project?
evals.expected_output: Same as eval 1 but triggered from a vaguer prompt. Should still identify taskmd as a CLI tool, find the --help --agent schema output, and present the consumer-facing guidance with source references.
